All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdditionalRoutesWindow
Prozor za prikaz dodatnih (top 5) ruta.
Departure
Represents a single departure for a mode of transport (bus or train) from one station to another.
Edge
Predstavlja granu u transportnom grafu.
Graph
Predstavlja transportni graf sa cvorovima (stanicama) i granama (polascima i transferima).
Graph.OptimizationCriteria
Enumeracija za kriterijume optimizacije.
Graph.Path
Klasa koja predstavlja putanju u grafu, cuvajuci cvorove i grane.
Main
Glavna klasa za pokretanje GUI aplikacije.
Node
Predstavlja cvor u transportnom grafu.
ReceiptManager
Upravlja cuvanjem racuna i ucitavanjem statistike prodaje.
SimpleJsonParser
A simple, custom JSON parser designed to read and interpret JSON strings.
Station
Represents a transportation hub within a city, encompassing both a bus station and a train station.
TransportData
A comprehensive data structure that holds all generated transportation information.
TransportDataGenerator
 
TransportDataMapper
